lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਸਰਹਿ ਜਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tin toon visareh ji doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Thse who are in love with duality forget You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਤੁਠਾ ਸੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jin ik man tutthaa se satigur sevaa laae |
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to the One Lord are assigned

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: manamukh agiaanee jonee paae |2|
lines.english: The ignorant, self-willed manmukhs are consigned to reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramatee har naam samaae |3|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, they are absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਤੁਠਾ ਤਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jin ik man tutthaa tin har man vasaae |
lines.english: to His service and enshrine Him within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੭॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak jo naam rate tin kau balihaaree |4|7|27|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to those who are attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||7||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਸੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa potai pun se giaan beechaaree |
lines.english: Those who have virtue as their treasure, contemplate spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਤਿਨ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa potai pun tin haumai maaree |
lines.english: Those who have virtue as their treasure, subdue egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਿਉ ਕਥਿਆ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: toon akath kiau kathiaa jaeh |
lines.english: You are Indescribable; how can I describe You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਅਨੇਕ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tere gun anek keemat neh paeh |1|
lines.english: Your Glorious Virtues are countless; their value cannot be estimated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis kee baanee tis maeh samaanee |
lines.english: The Word of His Bani belongs to Him; in Him, it is diffused.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਮਾਰਣੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabad maaran man maeh samaeh |
lines.english: Those who subdue their minds, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, are absorbed in You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਹ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh satigur teh satasangat banaaee |
lines.english: Where the True Guru is - there is the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teree akath kathaa gur sabad vakhaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your Speech cannot be spoken; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it is chanted. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਹਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh satigur sahaje har gun gaaee |
lines.english: Where the True Guru is - there, the Glorious Praises of the Lord are intuitively sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਹਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jeh satigur tahaa haumai sabad jalaaee |2|
lines.english: Where the True Guru is - there egotism is burnt away, through the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਮਹਲੀ ਥਾਉ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sevaa mahalee thaau paae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs serve Him; they obtain a place in the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh antar har naam vasaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs enshrine the Naam within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhagat har naam samaae |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs worship the Lord, and are absorbed in the Naam. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape daat kare daataar |
lines.english: The Giver Himself gives His Gifts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: poore satigur siau lagai piaar |
lines.english: as we enshrine love for the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੮॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate tin kau jaikaar |4|8|28|
lines.english: Nanak celebrates those who are attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||8||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸੁ ਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਰੂਪ ਹਹਿ ਰੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: ekas te sabh roop heh rangaa |
lines.english: All forms and colors come from the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਸਭਿ ਸਹਲੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: paun paanee baisantar sabh sehalangaa |
lines.english: Air, water and fire are all kept together.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh veechaare viralaa koee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: How rare is that Gurmukh who meditates on the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਿੰਨ ਭਿੰਨ ਵੇਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰੰਗਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhin bhin vekhai har prabh rangaa |1|
lines.english: The Lord God beholds the many and various colors. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਏਕੋ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: ek acharaj eko hai soee |
lines.english: The One Lord is wondrous and amazing! He is the One, the One and Only.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੁਤਿਆ ਦੇਇ ਜਗਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape sutiaa dee jagaaee |2|
lines.english: He Himself wakes us from sleep. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਭਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭਨੀ ਥਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj bhavai prabh sabhanee thaaee |
lines.english: God is naturally pervading all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa gupat pragatt prabh banat banaaee |
lines.english: Sometimes He is hidden, and sometimes He is revealed; thus God has made the world of His making.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਹਿ ਕਥਨੁ ਕਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: keh keh kathan kahai sabh koee |
lines.english: although everyone has tried, over and over again, to describe Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur sabad samaavai boojhai har soee |3|
lines.english: Those who merge in the Word of the Guru's Shabad, come to understand the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee keemat kinai na hoee |
lines.english: No one can estimate His value,

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: vaddee vaddiaaee gur sevaa te paae |
lines.english: They obtain glorious greatness by serving the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun vekhai sabad milaae |
lines.english: They listen to the Shabad continually; beholding Him, they merge into Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸੂਤਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sootaa maaeaa mohi piaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are asleep, in love and attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੪॥੯॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate har naam samaae |4|9|29|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Name are absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||4||9||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਜਾਗੇ ਜਿਨ ਨਾਮ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: se jan jaage jin naam piaar |1|
lines.english: Those humble beings who love the Naam, are awake and aware. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਗੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaage gun giaan beechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are awake, contemplating spiritual wisdom and the Glory of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur te boojhai jan koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: How rare are those humble beings who understand this through the Perfect Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੰਤੁ ਅਨਾੜੀ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: asant anaarree kade na boojhai |
lines.english: The unsaintly blockhead shall never understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਜਾਗੈ ਸਵੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje jaagai savai na koe |
lines.english: One who is awake to this intuitive wisdom does not fall asleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੀ ਕਰੇ ਤੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਲੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: kathanee kare tai maaeaa naal loojhai |
lines.english: He babbles on and on, but he is infatuated with Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਸੀਝੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: andh agiaanee kade na seejhai |2|
lines.english: Blind and ignorant, he shall never be reformed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh raam naam nisataaraa |
lines.english: In this age, salvation comes only from the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap tarai sagale kul udhaaraa |3|
lines.english: They save themselves, and save all their family and ancestors as well. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: viralaa ko paae gur sabad veechaaraa |
lines.english: How rare are those who contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
